message2: %1に体魔略奪Ⅰをかけた！

<HPDrainState>

<StateChangeHp:Math.min(Math.round(b.mdf + b.luk - a.mat * 7.5 + a.luk), -750) * (b.isStateAffected(109) ? 0.5 : 1)>

<StateChangeMp:Math.min(Math.round(b.mdf + b.luk - a.mat * 15 + a.luk), -1500) * (b.isStateAffected(109) ? 0.5 : 1)>
